# Looking to monetize a new blog?

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-03-12 18:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 596

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Looking for the best way to monetize your blog?

Recently, I was asked if I could recommend the best monetization
strategy for a NEW
blog – advertising or affiliate marketing.

Spoiler alert: I’d recommend affiliate marketing.

First off, unlike advertising, you DON’T need a lot of traffic to
make a decent revenue. You just need targeted traffic.

Plus, you can start monetizing your site from day 1. Still, it
won’t look amateurish thanks to affiliate links that are
naturally integrated within your content.

If you want to monetize your site with affiliate marketing, I
highly recommend using this plugin: ThirstyAffiliates 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..znj57NU76S17oU-AHmAalLPjpFnRaKhS8z7TuewVeLw ).

Here's why I love it... just 2 reasons:

1. Manage all your links in a single location

Imagine placing your affiliate links on hundreds of pages and all
of a sudden, your affiliate vendor moved to a new portal.

With a centralized link management system, you can replace the
link with a click rather than editing all those pages where
you've added the link.

2. Cloak your affiliate link

Smart affiliate marketers cloak their affiliate links because
many people see long, unfamiliar URLs as suspicious.

👉 Try ThirstyAffiliates Today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..znj57NU76S17oU-AHmAalLPjpFnRaKhS8z7TuewVeLw )

Whether you're just thinking about monetizing your blog or you're
already experienced with affiliate marketing, this tool makes
everything so much simpler.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
